product: Lakebase Public Preview enabled by default
tagline: The Lakebase: Managed Postgres OLTP Database preview is now enabled by default.
what_it_does: The Lakebase: Managed Postgres OLTP Database preview is now enabled by default. Users can start creating Lakebase database instances without needing workspace admins to enable this preview first. Admins can disable the preview if needed.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: The Lakebase: Managed Postgres OLTP Database preview is now enabled by default.
